titles: "60:40은 죽었다"던 사람들이 1년 만에 입장 바꾼 이유 — 박대리 35살, 몇 대 몇으로 섞어야 하나
월배당 채권 ETF라고 담았다가 당한다 — 진짜 채권 vs 커버드콜 가짜 채권 구별법 3가지
2022년 -17.5% 참사 85년 만에 왔다 — 60:40 부활의 조건과 지금 포트폴리오 공식
thumbnail_texts: 진짜 채권 vs 가짜 채권 / 속지 마라

character_poses.1: REACT-01 생각 중 — '60:40 부활?' 묘비 위 의문, 분석 진입
character_poses.2: REACT-05 설명 중(교수 모드) — 진짜 채권 vs 가짜 채권 구별 강의
character_poses.3: INTRO-05 정면 응시 + 손짓 — 35살 박대리용 65:35 황금비율 안내

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 생각 중(REACT-01). 좌측 똑똑이가 한 손 턱에 대고 위쪽 응시. 우측에 회색 묘비 — 묘비 위에 60:40 표시(균열·먼지). 묘비 위로 황금 빛이 솟아오르며 부활의 후광, 그 뒤로 부드럽게 우상향하는 황금 곡선. 묘비-빛-차트의 시각적 대비. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking upward, small pink nose, thoughtful pondering expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot, one paw resting on chin in thinking pose, a small thought bubble above the head containing a single bold question mark symbol. On the RIGHT side: a weathered gray stone tombstone embossed with a large '60:40' carving, partially fractured with visible cracks and faint dust particles. From above the tombstone, a brilliant column of warm golden light rises upward like a resurrection halo, and behind it a smooth upward-curving golden line chart soars softly. Subtle golden sparkle particles drift upward from the light beam. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with dramatic resurrection aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 교수 모드(REACT-05). 중앙 똑똑이가 안경 쓰고 검지 들어 'listen up' 제스처. 좌측에 빛나는 황금 채권 증서(REAL — 부드러운 우상향 곡선), 우측에 빨간 균열 들어간 가짜 채권 증서(FAKE — 들쭉날쭉 변동), 가운데 황금 'VS' 구분선. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, calm professional expression wearing small round glasses, one finger raised in a 'listen up' teaching gesture. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, half body shot. On the LEFT side: a glowing golden bond certificate with an ornate seal, behind it a smooth gentle upward-curving line chart in warm gold light, representing a real bond. On the RIGHT side: a cracked and faded bond certificate with visible red fissures, behind it a jagged volatile zigzag chart in muted red, representing a fake covered-call bond. A bold golden 'VS' divider separates the two sides. Left side bathed in warm golden trustworthy glow, right side in subtle crimson warning glow. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear contrast emphasis.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 정면 응시 + 안내 손짓(INTRO-05). 좌측 똑똑이가 정면 보며 따뜻한 미소로 한 손 앞으로 안내. 우측에 황금 균형 잡힌 원형 파이차트 — 큰 황금 영역 65%(주식)와 작은 에메랄드 영역 35%(채권), 가운데 작은 35 숫자 배지(연령). 파이 위에 황금 후광. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking directly at the viewer with a warm confident smile, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward in a welcoming presenter gesture inviting the viewer. On the RIGHT side: a large beautifully balanced pie chart with a dominant golden 65 percent slice glowing brightly with warm gold light, and a smaller emerald-green 35 percent slice complementing it. In the center of the pie, a small embossed badge displaying the age number 35 in bold gold. Soft golden lens flare and sparkle particles surround the pie chart. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and a soft radial glow behind the chart. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and emerald aesthetic.
